reviews.review_title: This game genuinely gives me a boner
reviews.review_description: Love this game cuz I like being touched

developer_response.body: *no comment but I am happy to see you enjoy our product!

reviews.review_description: Mods abusing power owner says i don’t care to the people that got banned for no reason.

developer_response.body: Sorry to this experience, it was not moderators on purpose but the fact that there was a bug to the banning system. Our moderators are dedicated and are known to try their hardest to keep this community positive. Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: Amazing game for all the horror lovers out there! Amazing graphics and gameplay!
I love the frequent updates and growing community and the gameplay is amazing.
It’s a pretty good game especially for gorilla tag content creators it’s good horror but waiting for update and new floors or levels over all good game!
Why does the game look like primal fear 2 I'll play it though

developer_response.body: It's a remake because it will never be released by the original developers. And since they promised to never release it, we have first-full rights to release this.

This is one of the best primal fears I played so far and also one of the funnest and the rag doll I also have I ideas
Ideas ⬇️


U should add more monsters and more level and more cosmetics u should also add game modes like nightmare mode or a mode where someone can play as the monster or a game mode where there is multiple monsters but overall I rate this a solid 10/10
